title: verbascum × arenicola
intro: Verbascum × arenicola, also known as the sand mullein, is a hybrid plant species within the mullein family, known for its unique characteristics and medicinal properties. The plant is valued for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, making it effective in treating various health issues such as coughs, colds, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Verbascum × arenicola include its ability to soothe respiratory problems, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat respiratory issues, skin conditions, and digestive problems.
